hffd919efg25fcg423bgb96fg562e71f24d08: Damn that Raphael. Such an intolerable ass.
he149fcefgc89dg44c4g844bg2afdd223d9a1: That insidious sneer, that know-it-all tone. If I wanted a scolding, I'd call on my father.
haeaa6dfdga61eg465dgaba4gf4ba44bc6ac6: You've mentioned your father before. Any chance of reconciliation?
h69e034abg7e54g435cg8dc4g5c45c9c0acf7: Doubtful. What use do I have with a man who finds joy in wealth but not wine? A man who turns bankers to beggars on whim alone?
h1cd0ec06gdc0dg433fg9906g773d7b844860: His last order was to make a man of myself.
h47306d3cg4206g4a1fg9f14g81e4a687f8fd: I did him one better: I became a hero. And I'll be damned if I let him take the credit.
h3eda7a9ag4001g4416g96b1gf341f918eb83: This again? You should move on.
h31a87333g017dg4595ga90fge6df03f37389: Fine advice, but  not easy to heed. The past nips at my heels like a street hound.
h63c1c41bg75b7g41fbg841fg3a42e478c9cf: Not on good terms with your father, I take it?
h33873ccbg0626g4460g93bbg4828eb4718fd: Not hardly. What use do I have with a man who finds joy in wealth but not wine? A man who turns bankers to beggars on whim alone?
h564f5641gac51g4703gaa68g9bd234d99adc: The Blade comes from noble stock, chief.
h5dd47883g0997g4540ga2f3g7e21ddef1042: Born in Baldur's Gate; bred in the Upper City. And a steadfast dagger in my father's side.
h669e7a0bgb904g4ad6g9c79g100e927a522f: A different time. A different Wyll.
hf5f0a32eg7acag48d3g8f49ge292e66913ad: Sounds like a posh life. Why did you leave it behind?
hcddc6642g868cg46aeg80d8gd518530686dd: I didn't leave. I was pushed.
h38500a87g0c54g4c21g8ebag8237c106ab2c: The patriars claim honour while demanding their subjects grovel and sweat.
hd79eb5cdgb73eg4df1g8585g11eaa9822ae0: My family walled off the poor, and drank from goblets bought with their toil.
habfb0344g6448g47c4g9699g710b3e11e057: I could've stayed rich. I chose to be legendary.
h386a7c82gc064g44c4gaae6g160a39edd75e: Ah - I knew I caught the whiff of privilege from you.
h4830453fg0150g4f74g8651gfaf433a12f4c: What house do you hail from?
h86a079e8ga7cag4edag8099gb126727ff67f: Eltan. I hail from House Eltan.
hdaae0b3cgcb1fg4ec5gaa15ge366637f1060: I'd expect as much. My great-grandfather's armour still hangs in the Seatower.
hc2bca664g0b31g4988g86d0gf85b6ab3be39: A steel tribute to an oligarch. The dukes claim honour while demanding their subjects grovel and sweat.
hf20a1828g2ea2g426ag8c5egb5ff5a027d71: I could've stayed rich. I chose to be legendary.
h780257f0g84aeg4811gbef2gefce1ad8cccc: And here I reckoned most of the city knew the name. My great-grandfather's armour still hangs in the Seatower.
h209cda97g381eg4ee6ga531ge35971f8955e: Useless nobility. Such houses hoard wealth and leave the poor to suffer.
h0675f194g7c75g4739g9abeg97f64f0243f5: Did you expect that I'd disagree?
h84f19b26g29e8g44degbe0cgcc94f84afd9c: The dukes claim honour while demanding their subjects grovel and sweat.
h4f55c300gf721g40e3ga8f5gbdd9428088a9: Eltan? Your forebear founded the Flaming Fist.
hcd19c5dageb33g404agb8b3g7f99b9c5f818: My great-grandfather, yes. His armour still hangs in the Seatower.
heae237fdg3271g48e3ga0ebga40ab57e8f1d: I claim no house, and no house claims me.
h60bf8bddg8dafg4a84gabc5g0e5e569f4be0: That brat shed his name and his riches for the good of the Coast. He is the Blade now.
h7e2da0edgdb5bg4dd6g902cg3cae577fdc17: And the Blade belongs to the people.
h78cbce91g8ffdg402dgbdbcgd3d84ca0cb56: Indeed. What use do I have with a father who finds joy in wealth but not wine? A man who turns bankers to beggars on whim alone?
